title: Composition with Yellow, Blue, and Red

params.name: Composition with Yellow, Blue, and Red
params.description: This painting embodies the ideas of painter Mondrian, who advocated for a new plasticism or neoplasticism style of painting, believing that art should transcend naturalistic depiction and focus on abstract expression using forms such as lines and colors. In his paintings, through the combination of basic elements like straight lines, right angles, primary colors, and non-colors, he expresses an abstract spirit, pursuing an absolute realm of unity between man and the divine.
